title: Quest Collectors
description: Quest Collectors modpack is made for the Quest Collectors SMP
body:
# Quest Collectors 
A Modpack for the adventurous and the crafty.

This modpack offers a vanilla plus experience. With the help of Waystones from the fabric waystones mods you can better explore and have fun in wast world of Terralith, Incedium and Nullscape.

And for those who wish to play on a server this modpack already provides the Simple Voice Chat mod and all of the usual enchantment mods. Enhanced Groups, Interactions and Audio Player.

As well as that, this modpack provides some performance mods to make the game a run a lot smoother.

And depending on what version of the pack you get There might be even more cool client side mods to play with.

## What makes this pack special?
This pack has 2 custom coded mods!
### Quest Life
Quest life is a custom mod inspired by Grians SecretLife series. This mod lets admins create and distribute custom quests.
### Liminal Life
Liminal Life is a Semi-Hardcore mod. What does that mean? It means you have a limited amount of lives, if you lose all of them you are put in spectator mode permanently.
## Pack Versions
This modpack has multiple versions so you can pick which one suits your play style.
<details>
  <summary>
  Bare Bones
  </summary>
Contains the bare minimium to be able to play on server with this modpack installed. 

Not recomnded for Singleplayer!

(This version is made specifically for playing on server, and is designed for vanilla purists who dont want any more mods then is needed.)
  
Made for ppl who want to:
- Make there own modpack
- Play with as least amount of mods posible 
</details>
<details>
  <summary>
  Lite
  </summary>
Contains all the mods of Bare Bones plus the mods the Server Pack has and some client side optimization mods.

Can be used in Singleplayer, will offer the full server expirance.

Made for ppl who want to:
- Make there own modpack without instilling performance mods
- Have a lite but optimized experience
</details>

<details>
  <summary>
  Full
  </summary>
Contains all the mods of Lite plus a good amount of client side mods. Should be a full 1 to 1 Optifine alternative.
  
Can be used in Singleplayer, will offer the full server expirance, plus more.

Made for ppl who want to:
- A fully customized experience
- Want a modpack to slightly tweak
</details>

<details>
  <summary>
  Server
  </summary>
Contains all the mods for any of the other variants to be able to connect to the server, and some performance mods
  
Should not be used on the client!

</details>
